response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<rss version="2.0" xmlns:atom="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom">
  <channel>
    <title>AI Weekly Newsletter</title>
    <link>https://example.com</link>
    <description>Weekly AI news and analysis</description>
    <atom:link href="https://example.com/feed" rel="self" type="application/rss+xml"/>
    <item>
      <title>Large Language Models: 2026 Update</title>
      <link>https://example.com/posts/llm-2026-update</link>
      <description>An overview of the latest advances in large language models, including new architectures, cost reductions, and expanded context windows.</description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 16 Feb 2026 08:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://example.com/posts/llm-2026-update</guid>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Vector Databases Compared</title>
      <link>https://example.com/posts/vector-db-comparison</link>
      <description>A detailed comparison of leading vector databases for production AI workloads, covering performance, cost, and ease of integration.</description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 08:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://example.com/posts/vector-db-comparison</guid>
    </item>
  </channel>
</rss>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<rss version="2.0">
  <channel>
    <title>Empty Feed</title>
    <link>https://example.com</link>
    <description>A feed with no items</description>
  </channel>
</rss>
